title: BDL – Trade Apprentices – 33 Posts

basic_details.job_title: BDL Trade Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 33 Posts
basic_details.short_information: BDL Recruitment 2026 offers 33 vacancies for Trade Apprentices posts. Eligible candidates with ITI can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 01-06-2026 through the official BDL website, bdl-india.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates must complete both online registration AND send a hard copy by post. Follow these steps:
